description: This pair of numero uno sneakers with sturdy soles, bold overlay and aggressive design highlights is a closet essential.  Class up your off-duty ensemble with this sleek sneaker. Wear them with fitted denims and a tee and throw on a tonal jacket for added style.UpperSynthetic leather upper for durability, comfort and styleStitched synthetic overlays for midfoot supportLace-up system for snug, customised FitSynthetic leather tongue for midfoot comfortPrinted branding on tongue for stylePerforations on the midfoot and toe regionMidsolePU midsole OutsoleDurable TPU outsole with terraced grooves and waffle patterned lugsA suction point in the midfoot region of the outsoleshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, cloth or brush, cold water and mild detergent to remove dustDo not machine wash or use a drierAvoid storing shoes in extremely hot conditions or in direct sunlight
